mapper.select: SELECT major_id FROM major WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND ( -- 条件1：默认专业（永久有权限） is_default = 1 -- 条件2：临时协助专业（有权限且未过期） OR ( temp_audit_auth = 1 AND (auth_expire_time IS NULL OR auth_expire_time > NOW()) ) )

SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS advisor_id FROM major sum INNER JOIN sys_user u ON sum.user_id = u.id WHERE -- 1. 目标专业 sum.major_id = #{majorId} -- 2. 有指导权限 AND sum.advisor_auth = 1 -- 3. 当前指导数 上限（核心新增条件） AND sum.current_advisor_count sum.max_advisor_count -- 4. 临时权限未过期（若有） AND (sum.temp_audit_auth = 0 OR sum.auth_expire_time IS NULL OR sum.auth_expire_time > NOW()) -- 5. 排除删除/禁用数据 AND sum.is_deleted = 0 AND u.user_type = 2 -- 教师角色 AND u.user_status = 1 -- 用户状态正常 AND u.is_deleted = 0 -- 按当前指导数升序（优先分配任务少的教师） ORDER BY sum.current_advisor_count ASC

SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS advisor_id FROM sys_user_major sum INNER JOIN sys_user u ON sum.user_id = u.id WHERE -- 1. 临时权限未过期（若有） (sum.temp_audit_auth = 0 OR sum.auth_expire_time IS NULL OR sum.auth_expire_time > NOW()) -- 2. 排除删除/禁用数据 AND sum.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO major ( user_id, major_id, is_default, temp_audit_auth, auth_expire_time, create_user_id, create_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.majorId}, 0, -- 临时权限默认不是“默认专业” #{item.tempAuditAuth}, #{item.authExpireTime}, #{item.createUserId}, NOW(), 0 )
-- 若已存在该用户-专业关联，更新临时权限和过期时间 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temp_audit_auth = VALUES(temp_audit_auth), auth_expire_time = VALUES(auth_expire_time), update_time = NOW(), is_deleted = 0
